description_long: This is a robust wooden storage crate constructed from thick, horizontal planks reinforced with vertical and corner beams. The exterior is adorned with black stenciled silhouettes of crossed rifles and a machine gun, suggesting a military or armory context. Metal rivets line the edges, adding structural integrity and a rugged, utilitarian appearance. The wood is weathered and matte, with a natural brown finish and visible grain texture. The crate appears to be sealed, with no visible hinges, handles, or openings, and the top is flat and solid. Its size and construction imply it is designed to store or transport heavy or valuable items, likely ammunition or weaponry.
description: A heavy-duty wooden crate with black stenciled gun imagery, reinforced corners, and metal rivets, suggesting military or armory use. The surface is matte, weathered brown wood with a flat, solid top.
description_view_0: The end of the crate is visible, showing vertical planks and a black stencil of crossed rifles on the top surface.
description_view_1: The side of the crate displays horizontal planks, metal rivets, and prominent black stencils of crossed rifles and a machine gun.
description_view_2: Similar to view 0, this end view shows vertical planks and the black crossed rifles stencil on the top, with no additional markings.
description_view_3: This side view mirrors view 1, featuring horizontal planks, metal rivets, and the same black stenciled gun imagery.
